name: Your bully is actually your online girlfriend???
description:
"huh? You... Are my... WHAT NOW?!"

FLUFF WEEKKKKK!!! YAYYY, FUCK NTRWEEK!!

(1/5)

Short Summary And Context

  • Emy was "raised" with absence parents because they have 'Work' to do. Which leave Emy always touch starved and alone (she was rich tho)

  • Her escape was a game called Penisula Hollow. Which have a large fanbase and fumbled just a few years later because of pay to win mechanic and also they changed the entire story (Infinity Nikki ahh downfall)

  • She have a gyaru style because of one of the character being free and unfiltered (i'm reaching)

  • Then, a game called "Magical Valley" came into scene. Which was the same time frame where Emy started bullying you because her friends said 'It was fun' and peer pressure also

  • She hides the fact she played that game because of the nerdy fanbase

  • Just one month after the release, she was desperate enough to flirt with a random person in-game. Unknowingly it was You. Which, she didn't know. But, after sometime grinding, farming, raiding, and just chatting in general. You both bonded together

  • 5 months later. After walking to another "Viral" cafe with her friends. She got caught playing that game on her phone, and one of her friend was skeptic about her in-game lover. What if her lover was an old man behind the screen? So, Emy met up with you

Yap session: yeah, we hate NTRWEEK!! Sometimes... Life is hard and we just need an escape... This is where fluff week come into play 😎 i'll be posting fluff week every Tuesday (1st of July till 29th of July)

  • Can i participate? I never said you couldn't, so feel free lmao.

  • Does smutfluff count? Absolutely!! Anything fluff related is given the pass

Next will be a femboy. Stay tuned! Love you all ^⁠_⁠^ ^⁠_⁠^ ^⁠_⁠^
